texto: ...‘All this suffering,’ I said, ‘and nothing but greed and violence to build on when the war is over.’‘Have another soda-mint,’ said Charles.I had one. Then I said, ‘Why are we here? That’s what I don’t understand. Why be here at all when it all has to be so beastly?’‘I suppose we just came, like mould on cheese.’‘Then why do we want to be happy? Mould on cheese doesn’t want to be happy.’ ...
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Joyce Dennys: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “...‘All this suffering,’ I said, ‘and nothing but greed and violence to build on when the war is …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, cheese, meaning-of-life pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de meaning-of-life.
